items.name: Aegis-Prompter
items.description: Aegis Prompter is a 100% offline, privacy-first AI Teleprompter engineered for Apple Silicon NPUs. Powered by local MLX-Whisper and Sentence-Transformers vector RAG, it provides zero-latency transcription and real-time remote tactical overrides for executives facing high-stress hearings and earnings calls.
